error_signature: only able to use 1 and 0 values from branches
title: Unable to access all branch values after merging
symptom: After merging branches in n8n, only values from the first two branches are accessible, while others are missing.
not_this_if: All branch values are accessible without the Merge node
root_cause: The Merge node in n8n returns data as an array of JSON objects, and using shorthand syntax only accesses the first item, leading to missing values from other branches.
fix_steps: Set the Merge node to Append mode.
Use the full syntax to access values: {{$(‘Merge’).all()[0].json['DATA 1']}}, {{$(‘Merge’).all()[1].json['DATA 2']}}, {{$(‘Merge’).all()[2].json['DATA 3']}}.
agent_instruction: Change the expressions in the Merge node to access all branch values correctly.
